◎简　　介  

　　Where would our favorite movies be without the music that fuels them? From the Top Gun jets soaring through the Danger Zone to everybody shaking' their Bacon in Footloose, music is an undeniable character in film, a character that can bring as much to a scene as any actor's performance.
